summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Soul Food Store Launch features (Iteration 10). All 13 test features verified working. Backend API correctly validates new coupons (WELCOME10, SOFU5, GAMENIGHT). Frontend displays Featured section with 3 bundle cards, correct pricing, and all required messaging.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend coupon_routes.py correctly defines WELCOME10 (10% off), SOFU5 ($5 fixed), GAMENIGHT ($10 fixed) with discount_type='fixed_cart'
Backend payment_routes.py has holiday_table_bundle ($19.99) and full_table_experience ($34.99) bundle products
Frontend QuickOrder.js Featured section has data-testid attributes for all 3 cards
Frontend merchandise array has hidden:true on gift-certificate item, correctly filtered out
PaymentSuccess.js success state shows 'Check your email for access' and 'support@kingdom-soul.com'
Global message 'Start now. Grow with us. Full releases coming soon.' appears in hero section
test_credentials: See /app/memory/test_credentials.md - WELCOME10, SOFU5, GAMENIGHT coupons added
seed_data_creation: None - coupons auto-seeded from DEFAULT_COUPONS in coupon_routes.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All store launch features verified working. New coupons (WELCOME10, SOFU5, GAMENIGHT) validate correctly. Featured section displays 3 cards with correct pricing. Gift certificate hidden. Thank You page has correct messaging in success state.

featured_section_3_cards.details: Featured section shows Holiday Table Bundle ($19.99, save $4), Full Table Experience ($34.99, Best Value, save $9), Holiday ePub AE ($14.99)

featured_bundles_add_to_cart.details: All 3 Featured cards have working Add to Cart buttons with data-testid attributes

welcome10_coupon.details: POST /api/coupons/validate with code=WELCOME10 returns valid=true, discount_percent=10

sofu5_coupon.details: POST /api/coupons/validate with code=SOFU5 returns valid=true, discount_dollars=5.00

gamenight_coupon.details: POST /api/coupons/validate with code=GAMENIGHT returns valid=true, discount_dollars=10.00

gift_certificates_hidden.details: No 'Gift Certificate' card visible in merchandise section - hidden:true flag correctly filters it out

game_night_lite.details: Gaming section shows 'Game Night Lite (30-Day)' at $6.39 (20% off $7.99) and 'Game Pass Full (90-Day)' at $19.99 (20% off $24.99)

thank_you_page_messaging.details: PaymentSuccess.js success state shows 'Check your email for access links and download instructions' and 'support@kingdom-soul.com'

global_message.details: 'Start now. Grow with us. Full releases coming soon.' visible in quick order page hero section

preorder_section_messaging.details: Pre-Order section shows 'complimentary digital access' messaging

bkft_snack_pack_note.details: Breakfast snack pack shows 'Includes Prayer Month 1' clarification text

frontend_ui_tests: Holiday Table Bundle card shows $19.99 with 'Save $4' badge
Full Table Experience card shows $34.99 with 'Best Value' badge
Holiday ePub AE card shows $14.99 with 'Instant Access' badge
Global message 'Start now. Grow with us. Full releases coming soon.' displayed
Free Resources section header (not Free Lessons)
BKFT Snack Pack note 'Includes Prayer Month 1' found
Gift Certificate card NOT visible (correctly hidden)
Add to Cart buttons work on all 3 Featured cards
WELCOME10 coupon applies correctly in checkout (10% off)

mocked_apis.email_service: Email sending via Resend API - RESEND_API_KEY is configured but emails may not actually send in preview environment
